name: Kerala Backwaters Cruise
description: Relax on traditional houseboats and explore the serene backwaters of Kerala with scenic beauty.
metaDescription: Explore Kerala's backwaters on traditional houseboats
itinerary: Day 1: Arrive Kochi|Day 2-3: Houseboat cruise|Day 4: Backwater exploration|Day 5: Departure
cancellationPolicy: Cancellation 30 days before departure: Full refund. 15-29 days: 50% refund. Less than 15 days: No refund.
paymentPolicy: 50% advance payment required at booking. Balance due 15 days before departure. Payment via bank transfer or credit card.
importantNotes: Bring comfortable clothing and sunscreen. Mosquito repellent recommended.
faqs: Is this tour suitable for senior citizens?|Yes with assistance|Are vegetarian meals included?|Yes available|What is the best time to visit?|October to March|Are flights included?|No

name: Himalayan Adventure Trek
description: Trek through the majestic Himalayas with breathtaking mountain views.
metaDescription: Experience the Himalayas with expert guides
itinerary: Day 1: Arrival|Day 2-5: Trekking|Day 6: Rest day|Day 7: Departure
cancellationPolicy: Cancellation 45 days before: Full refund. 30-44 days: 75% refund. Less than 30 days: 50% refund.
paymentPolicy: 100% advance payment required. Non-refundable if cancelled within 15 days.
importantNotes: High altitude trek - acclimatization essential. Fitness level required: moderate to high.
faqs: What is the altitude?|Up to 4000m|Is altitude sickness common?|Rare with proper acclimatization|What to pack?|Warm clothing and trekking boots
